kw.name: Load Environment And Create Session To API
Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC-E2E-02

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/environment.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens the application

kw.name: Login
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Logs in to the parabank with the provided username and password

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="fromAccountId"]' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="toAccountId"]' by index 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.msg: '[{"id":14254,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781568000000,"amount":1000.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":14365,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781568000000,"amount":1000.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Received"},{"id":15253,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":15475,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":16363,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":16585,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":17251,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":150.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":19915,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":20137,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":20581,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":20803,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":22912,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":23134,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"},{"id":23356,"accountId":13344,"type":"Debit","date":1781827200000,"amount":100.00,"description":"Funds Transfer Sent"}]' does not contain '120'
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: End-to-End Funds Transfer and API Validation Journey
